productDisplayName: Tantra Kid's Unisex Tribal Blast Green Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Celebrate the universal oneness of our tribes with this green cotton t-shirt from tantra. Designed with a traditional Warli tribal dance in a spiral that symbolises balance and progress, this tee is a great way to advocate the revival of the ancient arts. Pair it with jeans and fashionable lifestyle shoes or sandals from the wide range available at myntra for that unparalleled cool.
